subject: DevOps
title: Automated Testing in CI
description: One-minute skill: Automated Testing in CI.

hook.text: A developer said: 'I tested it locally, it works.' It didn't work in production. Local tests lie.

buildup.text: CI runs tests in a clean environment, from scratch. No leftover state, no lucky local configs.

discovery.text: Unit tests run first — fast and focused. Then integration tests check that components talk correctly.

twist.text: The test pyramid matters. Many unit tests, fewer integration tests, even fewer end-to-end tests. Fast feedback.

climax.text: A green test suite gives confidence to ship. A red test blocks the merge. Tests are the pipeline's immune system.

punchline.text: Automated tests in CI catch what humans miss. Every time.

quiz.question: What does the test pyramid recommend?
options: Many unit tests, fewer integration tests, even fewer E2E tests
Equal numbers of all test types
Only end-to-end tests for full coverage
